---
title: "Liquid Glass"
subtitle: "A RevealJS theme for Quarto"
format:
  liquid-glass-revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          :root {
            --lg-bg-image: url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1531366936337-7c912a4589a7?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1920&q=80');
          }
        </style>
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        <script>
        function initBgPicker() {
          var backgrounds = [
            { label: 'Aurora',    url: "url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1531366936337-7c912a4589a7?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1920&q=80')" },
            { label: 'Mountains', url: "url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1464822759023-fed622ff2c3b?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1920&q=80')" },
            { label: 'Forest',    url: "url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1448375240586-882707db888b?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1920&q=80')" },
            { label: 'Waterfall', url: "url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1433086966358-54859d0ed716?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1920&q=80')" },
          ];

          // Preload all picker images so they're cached before the user clicks.
          backgrounds.forEach(function (bg) {
            var m = bg.url.match(/url\(['"]?([^'"()]+)['"]?\)/);
            if (m) { new Image().src = m[1]; }
          });

          var titleSlide = document.getElementById('title-slide');
          if (!titleSlide) return;

          var picker = document.createElement('div');
          picker.className = 'lg-bg-picker';

          backgrounds.forEach(function (bg, i) {
            var btn = document.createElement('button');
            btn.className = 'lg-bg-btn' + (i === 0 ? ' active' : '');
            btn.textContent = bg.label;
            btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
              picker.querySelectorAll('.lg-bg-btn').forEach(function (b) {
                b.classList.remove('active');
              });
              btn.classList.add('active');
              document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--lg-bg-image', bg.url);
            });
            picker.appendChild(btn);
          });

          var panel = titleSlide.querySelector('.glass-panel') || titleSlide;
          panel.appendChild(picker);
        }

        if (typeof Reveal !== 'undefined') {
          Reveal.on('ready', initBgPicker);
        } else {
          document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initBgPicker);
        }
        </script>
---

## What is Liquid Glass?

- Inspired by Apple's Liquid Glass design language (WWDC 2025)
- A floating frosted glass panel over a full-bleed background image
- A blurred background layer fades in on content slides and out on the title slide
- All design values are CSS custom properties — no forking required

## How It Works

- A fixed-position `lg-blurred-bg` layer fades in on content slides, out on the title slide
- The JS plugin wraps each slide's children in a `.glass-panel` div
- `.glass-panel` uses `backdrop-filter: brightness()` to darken the blurred image behind it
- `::before` adds the glass rim; `::after` adds the tint and sheen gradient

## Customisation

- Set `--lg-bg-image` to your own image URL
- Adjust `--lg-bg-blur`, `--lg-radius`, `--lg-panel-width` and more
- All variables are listed in `_extensions/liquid-glass/liquid-glass.css`
- No need to fork — just override variables in `include-in-header`

## Installation

```bash
quarto add AJBogo9/liquid-glass-revealjs
```

Then in your presentation:

```yaml
format:
  liquid-glass-revealjs: default
```
